verbGlossary.EXTRACTED FROM: {source} produced by exporting views and sheets from the 3D BIM {target}
verbGlossary.GENERATED FROM: {source} auto-generated from {target}-based view or section cut
verbGlossary.REDLINED AGAINST: {source} marked up by comparing to the current state of {target}
verbGlossary.COUNTED TOWARD: Each drawing revision increments {target}-level revision frequency metric
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINS: {source} defines material and performance requirements that {target} properties must satisfy
verbGlossary.PRESCRIBES: {source} mandates the level of development required for {target} elements at each project phase
verbGlossary.AMENDS: {source} formally modifies design intent already captured in {target}
verbGlossary.ORIGINATES FROM: {source} raised because a coordination issue in {target} needs design clarification
verbGlossary.CLARIFIES: {source} seeks interpretation of ambiguous geometry or data within {target}
verbGlossary.RESOLVES DETAIL FOR: {source} provides the missing information needed to complete {target} element's definition
verbGlossary.ACCELERATES: A timely RFI response shortens {target} resolution cycle
verbGlossary.VALIDATES: {source} confirms that proposed materials and equipment match {target}-specified properties
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS QUANTITIES IN: {source} verifies manufacturer quantities against {target}-based takeoff counts
verbGlossary.APPROVES DETAIL FOR: {source} review sign-off authorizes advancing the element to its next {target}
verbGlossary.FABRICATION-CHECKED AGAINST: {source} dimensions and connections verified against the source BIM geometry
verbGlossary.DETAILS: {source} provides fabrication-level detail for a specific {target} element
verbGlossary.POPULATES: {source} submittal supplies manufacturer specs that fill in {target} parameter fields
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES FINISH FOR: {source} submittal defines color, texture, or material finish applied to {target} element
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source} rejection rate trends alongside clash resolution throughput as coordination indicators
verbGlossary.ESCALATES: {source} raises an unresolved {target} for senior decision-making
verbGlossary.DELIVERS: {source} formally routes {target} files or exported views to project stakeholders
verbGlossary.IMPACTS SEQUENCE IN: {source} of delay shifts activity dates within the schedule-linked 4D simulation
verbGlossary.RECORDS DECISIONS FROM: {source} capture resolutions and action items from a BIM coordination session
verbGlossary.REVIEWS RESULTS OF: Project meeting agenda includes walk-through of automated {target} findings
verbGlossary.TRACKS PROGRESS AGAINST: {source} compares actual field progress to planned sequences in {target}
verbGlossary.CROSS-REFERENCES: {source} note links narrative field observations to corresponding construction photographs
verbGlossary.DIRECTS INSTALL OF: {source} tells the crew how to install or adjust a specific {target} element in the field
verbGlossary.SUPERSEDES: {source} issued {target}-based drawing with a newer version
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS RESOLUTION FOR: {source} designates a responsible party and deadline for {target} fix
verbGlossary.REMEDIATES: {source} line item prescribes the corrective step to eliminate a detected clash
verbGlossary.SCHEDULED FOR: Project task placed on the agenda for the next BIM coordination meeting
verbGlossary.SUPPLEMENTS: Site photograph adds visual context alongside a 360-degree spherical capture
verbGlossary.FIELD-VALIDATES: {source} taken on site confirms as-installed conditions against {target} data
verbGlossary.AUGMENTS: {source}provides additional aerial context beyond a single drone capture frame
verbGlossary.CLOSES OUT AGAINST: {source}verified and signed off by comparing to the as-built {target}
verbGlossary.COMPILED INTO: {source}documentation collected and merged into the final as-built {target} record
verbGlossary.FEEDS: O&M manual content loaded into the digital twin for ongoing facility operations reference
verbGlossary.WARRANTS: {source}documentation attaches manufacturer guarantee coverage to the installed {target} element
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: Permit application cites {target} views as supporting evidence for code compliance
verbGlossary.ZONES WITHIN: {source}plan maps restricted and hazard zones onto the spatial layout of {target}
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS AGAINST: {source} volume density compared to {target} density to gauge design completeness
verbGlossary.INFLUENCES: {source} cycle time affects the overall BIM coordination adoption score for the project
verbGlossary.MIRRORS: {source} frequency in {target} log tracks in parallel with model-side revision counts
